prayer.completeMessage: Your prayer lights up the world

meta.title: ON-GI
meta.description: You are the light of the world. Let's brighten the darkness with the warmth of prayer.
meta.inviteDescription: You are the light of the world. Join us in prayer through this invite link.

easter.verse1:
You are the light of the world.
A city set on a hill cannot be hidden.
easter.title: The Story of Those Who Made This
easter.story1:
One of us was a marketer.
For six years he worked fiercely at an ad agency. He was certain God had led him there, yet he wandered, unable to find meaning in his daily work.
easter.story2:
After years of prayer, a small hope arrived.
"Could cutting-edge technology like AI serve the church and the faith of Christians?"
easter.story3: Carrying that hope, he set out to find a fellow worker.
easter.story4:
The other was a developer.
He dreamed of building a successful startup, yet had never truly sought the work the Lord desired. He spent three years waiting for the Lord's timing — sharing the gospel at his workplace, praying for vision and calling.
easter.story5: One winter, on a day of futsal outreach, a small idea shared by a brother became a spark. From that spark, 'the Prayer Light' was first sketched.
easter.story6:
And so the two met.
Asking for nothing in return, simply seeking to discern what is pleasing to the Lord.
easter.story7:
We hope this app becomes the light of prayers rising from every corner of the world,
and that this light shines into the darkness.
easter.verse2:
So that you may approve what is excellent,
filled with the fruit of righteousness that comes through Jesus Christ,
to the glory and praise of God.
